_note: SCRIPT GAG LOCKS — the mechanism of a scripted comedy gag is LOCKED. The Director may SPLIT a beat into shots/sub-beats, but must NEVER mutate the gag (weaken the visual payoff, delay the reveal, drop the moustache shape, reframe the tone, or reorder the locked lines). cb_seedance injects these into the flattened Seedance prompt + the validator enforces them. Keyed by gag_id; a beat references one via beat.script_gag_lock_id.

S1_FUZZBY_POLLEN_MOUSTACHE.source_script_span: Fuzzby boasts he is an extremely busy bee, presses his face into a flower's pollen, pulls back with a fuzzy yellow pollen handlebar moustache and goatee, asks 'Do I look official?'; Zenny answers 'Yes Fuzzby. Officially nuts!'
S1_FUZZBY_POLLEN_MOUSTACHE.setup: Fuzzby boasts he is an extremely busy bee and leans face-first into an open flower's pollen — body always outside the bloom.
S1_FUZZBY_POLLEN_MOUSTACHE.required_visual_payoff: Fuzzby pulls his face back from the flower — his whole body, wings and legs fully visible and OUTSIDE the bloom the entire time — now wearing a large yellow pollen handlebar moustache and a small yellow pollen goatee, with pollen dust on his cheeks and nose.
S1_FUZZBY_POLLEN_MOUSTACHE.carry_visual: large yellow pollen handlebar moustache and small pollen goatee
S1_FUZZBY_POLLEN_MOUSTACHE.timing_lock: The handlebar moustache and goatee must be clearly visible BEFORE Fuzzby says 'Do I look official?', and must stay visible — getting messier when he wipes, never clean — through Zenny's 'Officially nuts!' and to the end of the beat.
S1_FUZZBY_POLLEN_MOUSTACHE.character_misread: Fuzzby sincerely believes the pollen handlebar moustache and goatee may make him look official.
S1_FUZZBY_POLLEN_MOUSTACHE.carryover_state: Beat 4 opens with Fuzzby still wearing the smeared handlebar pollen moustache and messy pollen goatee — he never wiped it clean.
forbidden_interpretations: Do not make the moment primarily emotional or embarrassed.
Do not make Zenny overly sentimental.
Do not change the line order.
No disappearing into the flower; Fuzzby's body, wings, legs and silhouette never vanish into the bloom.
No full body entering the flower; only his face, nose and cheeks press into the pollen.
No 'buried inside flower' or 'swallowed by the flower' staging.
No vague pollen dusting — the payoff is a readable large yellow handlebar moustache PLUS a small pollen goatee.
No clean face after wiping; the wipe smears the pollen worse, it never removes it.
No wiping the moustache or goatee off completely.
No loss of the pollen moustache or goatee before the end of the beat.
S1_FUZZBY_POLLEN_MOUSTACHE.acting_note: Fuzzby: proud, clueless and hopeful, not embarrassed or wounded — he presses only his FACE into the pollen, never his body. Zenny: dry and trying not to laugh, almost still. The joke is the readable handlebar-moustache-and-goatee disguise plus Fuzzby's total lack of self-awareness — and the failed wipe that smears it worse.
validation_rules: Beat 3b MUST state the moustache is visible before 'Do I look official?'.
Fuzzby's body must stay OUTSIDE the flower (no entering/burying/disappearing).
Beat 4 continuity MUST carry the smeared pollen moustache/goatee forward.
Do not reframe the gag as embarrassment, sadness, shame or emotional hurt.
